zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Sargent於1559年5月8日出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾庫廷哈爾時，她的父親Hugh Roger Sargent29歲，母親Agnes Margaret Gifford24歲。她於1574年與George Coles在英國英格蘭素可結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1605年6月16日在英國素可普爾波洛享年46歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特法維沙安。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Sargent于1559年5月8日出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾庫廷哈爾时，她的父亲Hugh Roger Sargent29岁，母亲Agnes Margaret Gifford24岁。她于1574年与George Coles在英国英格兰素可结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1605年6月16日在英国素可普爾波洛享年46岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特法維沙安。

nameMeanings.name: Sargent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: status or occupational name from Middle English sergeaunt ‘servant’ (Old French sergent, serjant). The surname probably originated for the most part in this sense, but the word also developed a number of more specialized meanings in the medieval period, including ‘tenant by military service below the rank of knight’. It was also used for a variety of administrative and legal offices, which may have contributed to the development of the surname. The sense ‘non-commissioned officer’ did not arise until the 16th century. Compare Sergent .

History: William Sargent (1624–1717) came to Gloucester, MA, from Devon, England before 1678. Many of his descendants distinguished themselves in the civil and military affairs of the colonies and some in literary or artistic paths, notably the portrait painter John Singer Sargent (1856–1925).

variants.name: Sergent
meanings: French: status or occupational name from Old French sergent, serjant ‘servant’ (see Sargent ).
Americanized form of Jewish (from Poland) Sierżant: artificial name meaning ‘sergeant’ (senior noncommissioned officer in the Polish infantry).

variants.name: Surgent
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Anatole, Emile.
Slovak: probably a nickname derived from Latin surgens, the present participle of surgo ‘to rise, to get up, to arise’.
French: probably a derivative of Surge, an occupational name from Old French surge ‘surgeon’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Sargent was born on 8 May 1559, in Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Hugh Roger Sargent, was 29 and her mother, Agnes Margaret Gifford, was 24. She married George Coles in 1574, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 16 June 1605, in Pulborough, Sussex, England, at the age of 46, and was buried in Faversham, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Sargent est née le 8 mai 1559, à Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Roger Sargent, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Agnes Margaret Gifford, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé George Coles en 1574, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 juin 1605, à Pulborough, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Faversham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Sargent am 8. Mai 1559 in Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh Roger Sargent 29 und ihre Mutter Agnes Margaret Gifford 24. Sie hat 1574 in Sussex, England, United Kingdom George Coles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. Juni 1605 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Pulborough, Sussex, England und wurde in Faversham, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Sargent è nata il il 8 maggio 1559 nel Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, Hugh Roger Sargent, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Agnes Margaret Gifford, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato George Coles nel 1574, nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 16 giugno 1605, nel Pulborough, Sussex, England, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Faversham, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Sargentが1559年5月8日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアコウルティーンハルで生まれた時，父Hugh Roger Sargentは29歳，母Agnes Margaret Giffordは24歳であった。1574年にイギリスイギリススセックスでGeorge Colesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1605年6月16日にイギリススセックスプウルボロウで46歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントファバーシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Sargent(이)가 1559년 5월 8일 영국 노르섬프토실르 쿠르티홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh Roger Sargent(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Margaret Gifford(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1574년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 George Coles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1605년 6월 16일 영국 수세스 풀버루그h에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 파버샤에 묻혔다.

pt.8 May 1559–16 June 1605: 8 de maio de 1559–16 de junho de 1605
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Sargent nasceu em 8 de maio de 1559, em Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Roger Sargent, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Margaret Gifford, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com George Coles em 1574, em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de junho de 1605, em Pulborough, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Faversham, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Sargent родилась 8 мая 1559 г. в местности коуртинолл, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh Roger Sargent было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Margaret Gifford, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени George Coles в 1574 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 16 июня 1605 г. в местности пулбороую, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности фавиршам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.8 May 1559–16 June 1605: 8 de mayo de 1559–16 de junio de 1605
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Sargent nació el 8 de mayo de 1559, en Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh Roger Sargent, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Agnes Margaret Gifford, tenía 24 años. Se casó con George Coles en 1574, en Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 16 de junio de 1605, en Pulborough, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en Faversham, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
